title: Microchip Technology: Internet Of Things Boosts Demand Across All Products
text: We believe its microcontroller segment, its largest segment (54% of revenues), could benefit from the expected growth in IoT and projected its revenue to grow by 5.4% on average. Moreover, we expect its FPGA segment to grow at an average of 5.8% through 2027 supported by its expanded product lineup with the acquisition of Microsemi.

title: What's Behind Microchip Technology Stock's Stellar Outperformance Since 2018?
text: Microchip Technology Inc. (NASDAQ: MCHP) stock price jumped around 3.3x from $18 in 2018 end, to almost $60 currently, primarily due to favorable changes in its P/S multiple.

title: Industry's Largest Family of Inductive Position Sensors Now Includes Solution for ISO 26262-Compliant EV Motor Control Applications

title: Why Is Microchip Tech (MCHP) Up 3.6% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Microchip Tech (MCHP) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Microchip Technology to Present at the Bank of America Securities 2022 Global Technology Conference
text: CHANDLER, Ariz., June 06, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- (NASDAQ:MCHP) – Microchip Technology Incorporated, a leading provider of smart, connected and secure embedded control solutions, announced today that the Company will present at the Bank of America Securities 2022 Global Technology Conference on Wednesday, June 8 at 12:45 p.m. (Pacific Time). Presenting for the Company will be Mr. Ganesh Moorthy, President and CEO, and Mr. Eric Bjornholt, Senior Vice President and CFO. A live webcast of the presentation will be made available by BofA, and can be accessed on the Microchip website at www.microchip.com.

title: Microchip Simplifies Automotive Designs with ISO 26262-Compliant, AUTOSAR-Ready Devices and Ecosystem
text: New dsPIC33C DSCs add support for AUTOSAR, OS, MCAL drivers and functional safety, enabling robust and secure automotive solutions New dsPIC33C DSCs add support for AUTOSAR, OS, MCAL drivers and functional safety, enabling robust and secure automotive solutions
